sprints.question: Phase 0: Ship video embed, zero-dep analytics (IndexedDB + GH traffic cron), mobile fix (show install button), feature flag (?cascade=off)
Rx5: Generate 50 pre-computed question-answer demo sets with Claude, build custom fuzzy matcher (~150 LOC), template fallback for unmatched queries
Rx6: Implement 3-layer zero-dep cascade (Library instant → Cached model ~2s → Downloading background), return visitor fast path, debug panel
Rx7+Rx8: Build 2-3 EXPLORE turns with XGrammar JSON enforcement, follow-up chips after compile, claim accumulation, sliding window context. GATE: test 360M output quality on Day 2
Rx9+Rx10: Dual handoff buttons (claude-cli:// deep link + clipboard copy), human-readable summary payload (~1300 chars), handoff nudge at turn 3, prominent at turn 5
Rx11-14: Border glow peek (8px margin), shader blob progress amplification, 3 demo topics with varied compiler behavior, attract mode auto-play (1 rotation + replay)
